using System.Text;
using Azure.Storage.Blobs;

private static Mock<BlobServiceClient> CreateBlobServiceClientMock(string blobContent)
{
    var blobServiceClientMock = new Mock<BlobServiceClient>();
    var blobContainerClientMock = new Mock<BlobContainerClient>();
    var blobClientMock = new Mock<BlobClient>();

    blobServiceClientMock
        .Setup(client => client.GetBlobContainerClient(It.IsAny<string>()))
        .Returns(blobContainerClientMock.Object);

    blobContainerClientMock
        .Setup(container => container.GetBlobClient(It.IsAny<string>()))
        .Returns(blobClientMock.Object);

    blobClientMock
        .Setup(blob => blob.DownloadToAsync(It.IsAny<Stream>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .Callback<Stream, CancellationToken>((stream, cancellationToken) =>
        {
            byte[] bytes = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(blobContent);
            stream.Write(bytes, 0, bytes.Length);
            stream.Position = 0;
        })
        .Returns(Task.CompletedTask);

    return blobServiceClientMock;
}
